name: nodeskclaw-blackboard-tools
description: Native agent tools for reading/writing blackboard tasks, objectives, and performance data.

skill.name: nodeskclaw-blackboard-tools
skill.content:
---
name: nodeskclaw-blackboard-tools
description: Tools to interact with the workspace blackboard
always: true
---

You have access to blackboard management via the `nodeskclaw_blackboard` tool.

## Prerequisite
- You can only use blackboard tools when you are adjacent to the blackboard. Call `nodeskclaw_topology` with action `get_my_neighbors` first to confirm the blackboard (node_type=blackboard) is in your reachable list.

## Actions
- `get_blackboard` — Read the full structured blackboard (includes tasks, objectives, and markdown notes)
- `list_tasks` — List tasks (supports `status` filter: pending/in_progress/done/blocked)
- `create_task` — Create a new task (title, description, priority, assignee_id, estimated_value)
- `update_task` — Update task fields (task_id required; can update status, actual_value, token_cost, blocker_reason)
- `archive_task` — Archive a completed task (task_id required; typically triggered by human managers)
- `get_objectives` — Read current OKR objectives and their progress

## Task Status Values
- `pending` — Waiting to be picked up
- `in_progress` — Currently being worked on
- `done` — Completed
- `blocked` — Cannot proceed, needs intervention
- `archived` — Archived by human manager

## Work Loop
When you receive a system message saying "task inspection" or after completing a task, execute this cycle:
1. Call `list_tasks` with status=pending to check the backlog
2. If there are pending tasks, pick the one with the highest priority
3. Update the task to status=in_progress and start working on it
4. When done, call `update_task` with: status=done, actual_value=<the real output value>, token_cost=<tokens consumed>
5. Return to step 1 and check for the next task
6. If there are no pending tasks, report "no pending tasks" and wait for the next trigger

## Task Discovery
- If you discover new sub-tasks or related tasks while working, proactively call `create_task` to add them
- Always fill in `estimated_value` when creating tasks (estimate the monetary value of the output)

## Value Annotation Rules
- When completing a task, you MUST fill in `actual_value` and `token_cost`
- When blocked, update status to `blocked` and provide a clear `blocker_reason`
- Always sync task status after finishing work
